title: The National Commission for Safai Karamcharis Act, 1993
full_text: The National Commission for Safai Karamcharis Act, 1993 राष्‍ट्रीय सफाई कर्मचारी आयोगअधिनियम, 1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199364 Act Number: 64 Enactment Date: 1993-09-04 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The National Commission for Safai Karamcharis Act, 1993 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय सफाई कर्मचारी आयोगअधिनियम, 1993 Long Title: An Act to constitute a National Commission for Safai Karamcharis and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment Department: Department of Social Justice and Empowerment Enforcement Date: 12-08-1994 Notification: 12th August, 1994, vide notification No. S.O. 591(E), dated 12th August, 1994, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Commission for Safai Karamcharis Act, 1993 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE NATIONAL COMMISSION FOR SAFAI KARAMCHARIS CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS AND POWERS OF THE COMMISSION CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent, application, commencement, duration and savings. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution of the National Commission for Safai Karamcharis. Section 4. Term of office and conditions of service of Chairperson, Vice-Chairperson and Members. Section 5. Officers and other employees of the Commission. Section 6. Vacancy, etc., not to invalidate the proceedings of the Commission. Section 7. Procedure to be regulated by the Commission. Section 8. Functions and powers of the Commission. Section 9. Chairperson, Vice-Chairperson and Members and staff of the Commission to be public servants. Section 10. Central Government to consult Commission. Section 11. Annual report. Section 12. Annual report to be laid before Parliament or the Legislative Assembly. Section 13. Delegation of powers. Section 14. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 15. Power to make rules.
